title: Indiaâ€™s Andhra Pradesh to Become a Green Hydrogen Valley, Declares CM Sri Chandrababu Naidu at the Green Hydrogen Summit 2025, SRM AP
content: Mr. N Chandrababu Naidu, Chief Minister of Andhra Pradesh State in India, unveiled the Amaravati Green Hydrogen Valley Declaration at his camp office in the presence of Chief Secretary K Vijayanand and NEDCAP Managing Director Kamalakara Babu. The declaration outlines a strategic roadmap to transform Andhra Pradesh into a Green Hydrogen Valley by 2030, positioning the State as a leader in clean energy production in India.
author: Analysts Account
